meta.notes: Finnish household electricity — average for "2,500 kWh–4,999 kWh" annual consumption, from Statistics Finland (Tilastokeskus), StatFin table 13rb. All-in 22.93 c/kWh = electric energy 6.83 + distribution 9.19 + taxes (electricity tax + VAT) 6.91. Licensed CC BY 4.0 — attribute Statistics Finland. A statistical average, not a shoppable plan. Period 2026M03.
